system.requirement: The Kraken destroys all those before you.

abilities.description: Monstrous: When you summon the Kraken, fill 1 segment of a 4-segment clock. The Kraken will heed a single command to overcome a foe or obstacle. While it is in your service, it cannot be harmed. If you are in a fight, @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.3129f4caa4754caf]{Take Decisive Action} with an automatic strong hit. When the clock is filled, @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.bd6278f18bbd6739]{Ask the Oracle} ('50/50') if the Kraken turns against you. On a yes, discard this asset; the Kraken is now an epic foe. On a no, clear 1 segment of the clock.
Terrifying: When you make a move using a threat to call the Kraken as leverage, add +2.

Devil-Dealing: One time only, when you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.985a5415860a99e9]{Fulfill Your Vow} (formidable or greater) in service to the Kraken, choose one: clear all clock segments, or discard this asset and mark 3 boxes on your bonds legacy track.
